message:
npm package: createHandler factory, CLI, security hardening, perf and docs fixes

npm package:
- Add src/handler.ts: createHandler() factory extracts routing from worker
- Add src/index.ts: main entry point exporting RepoStore, GitEngine, etc.
- Add bin/gitmode.mjs: CLI with init (scaffold) and deploy commands
- Add bin/template/: worker.ts and wrangler.jsonc scaffold templates
- Refactor worker/index.ts and test/worker.ts to use createHandler (-545 lines)
- Update package.json: remove private, add exports/bin/files/peerDeps

Security hardening:
- Validate git ref names (control chars, .., @{, .lock, etc.)
- Validate file paths in commit API (reject .., null bytes, traversal)
- Validate owner/repo URL segments (block path traversal)
- 100MB packfile size limit on receive-pack
- 1000 ref update limit per push with proper git protocol error
- Tree recursion depth cap (100) in checkout.ts and git-porcelain.ts
- Varint parsing bounds (shift<28, pos<data.length) in packfile-reader
- 32MB decompression buffer cap in packfile-reader
- resolveRef tilde walk capped at 10000
- limitString with UTF-16 surrogate-safe truncation
- String field limits: 1MB message, 10KB description, 1KB author/email
- Content-Length forwarded for early packfile rejection

Bug fixes:
- WASM init missing in readObjects (fell to slow node:zlib path)
- zlibInflateTracked alloc failure check (potential heap corruption)
- zlibInflate throws on OOM (enables node:zlib fallback)
- cherryPick/revert parent type check before parseCommit
- Redundant URL parse in routeApi

Performance:
- listTags: N readObject → single readObjects batch
- cherryPick/revert: 2 sequential reads → 1 batch
- log BFS: sort within each level by timestamp
- Dead readTreeMap method removed
- Magic numbers → OBJ_COMMIT/OBJ_TREE/OBJ_TAG constants
- Unused type param removed from typeSizeHeaderLen

Docs:
- README: npm package section, CLI docs, project structure update
- Fix WasmEngineCore import typo for gitmode/client
- Fix index.mdx R2 description (loose objects → 2MB chunks)
- Fix git-engine.ts header comment (add chunk storage layout)
- Fix putObjects comment (~4MB → ~2MB)
- Add permissions table to architecture.mdx
- Fix dev command in getting-started.mdx and ssh-transport.mdx
- Fix deployment.mdx wrangler main path
- Add StatusEntry to exports

files.patch:
@@ -143,13 +143,45 @@ pnpm run dev
 pnpm run deploy
 ```
 
-## npm exports
+## npm package
 
-Two tree-shakeable entry points for use as a library:
+Install gitmode as an npm package to run your own git server on Cloudflare Workers:
+
+```bash
+npx gitmode init     # Scaffold worker + wrangler config
+npx gitmode deploy   # Deploy to Cloudflare Workers
+```
+
+Or import directly into your Worker:
+
+```ts
+import { RepoStore, createHandler } from "gitmode";
+export { RepoStore };
+export default { fetch: createHandler() };
+```
+
+With custom auth:
+
+```ts
+import { RepoStore, createHandler } from "gitmode";
+export { RepoStore };
+const gitmode = createHandler();
+export default {
+  fetch(req, env) {
+    if (!authorize(req)) return new Response("Unauthorized", { status: 401 });
+    return gitmode(req, env);
+  }
+};
+```
+
+### Entry points
+
+Three tree-shakeable entry points:
 
 ```ts
-import { WasmEngine } from "gitmode/server";  // Full engine (865KB WASM) — server-side git ops
-import { WasmEngine } from "gitmode/client";  // Core engine (83KB WASM) — SHA-1, zlib, delta only
+import { createHandler, RepoStore } from "gitmode";            // Server handler + DO class
+import { WasmEngine } from "gitmode/server";   // Full engine (865KB WASM) — server-side git ops
+import { WasmEngineCore } from "gitmode/client";  // Core engine (83KB WASM) — SHA-1, zlib, delta only
 ```
 
 ## Project structure
@@ -174,9 +206,15 @@ gitmode/
 │   └── vendor/libdeflate/   Vendored libdeflate 1.25
 ├── wasm/libgit2-wasm/       libgit2 compiled to WASM
 ├── deps/libgit2/            libgit2 source (submodule)
+├── bin/
+│   ├── gitmode.mjs          CLI (npx gitmode init/deploy)
+│   └── template/            Scaffold templates for init
 ├── src/
+│   ├── index.ts             npm main entry point
 │   ├── server.ts            Server entry point (full WASM)
 │   ├── client.ts            Client entry point (core WASM)
+│   ├── handler.ts           createHandler() factory (git + REST routing)
+│   ├── env.ts               Cloudflare env bindings type
 │   ├── git-engine.ts        R2 + DO SQLite orchestration (chunk storage, batch reads)
 │   ├── git-porcelain.ts     High-level git ops (merge, cherry-pick, stats)
 │   ├── wasm-engine.ts       Typed WASM wrapper (server)
@@ -191,7 +229,7 @@ gitmode/
 │   ├── pkt-line.ts          Git pkt-line protocol framing
 │   ├── ssh-handler.ts       SSH command parser
 │   └── hex.ts               Fast hex encoding (lookup table)
-├── worker/                  Cloudflare Worker entry
+├── worker/                  Cloudflare Worker entry (with vinext UI)
 ├── app/                     vinext UI (React Server Components)
 ├── test/
 │   ├── gitmode.test.ts      Integration tests (87 tests)

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+// gitmode Worker entry point
+//
+// This is the minimal setup. Customize by adding auth, rate limiting, etc.
+//
+// Docs: https://github.com/teamchong/gitmode
+
+import { RepoStore, createHandler } from "gitmode";
+
+// Re-export the Durable Object class (required by Cloudflare)
+export { RepoStore };
+
+// Create the fetch handler
+const handler = createHandler();
+
+export default {
+  fetch: handler,
+};

@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+{
+  "name": "gitmode",
+  "main": "./worker/index.ts",
+  "compatibility_date": "2025-12-01",
+  "compatibility_flags": ["nodejs_compat"],
+
+  // R2: git object storage + materialized worktrees
+  "r2_buckets": [
+    {
+      "binding": "OBJECTS",
+      "bucket_name": "gitmode-objects"
+    }
+  ],
+
+  // Durable Objects: per-repo SQLite for refs, metadata, permissions
+  "durable_objects": {
+    "bindings": [
+      { "name": "REPO_STORE", "class_name": "RepoStore" }
+    ]
+  },
+
+  "migrations": [
+    { "tag": "v1", "new_sqlite_classes": ["RepoStore"] }
+  ],
+
+  // WASM module
+  "rules": [
+    {
+      "type": "CompiledWasm",
+      "globs": ["**/*.wasm"],
+      "fallthrough": false
+    }
+  ]
+}

@@ -64,6 +64,12 @@ CREATE TABLE commits (
   timestamp INTEGER NOT NULL
 );
 
+-- Access control
+CREATE TABLE permissions (
+  username TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+  role TEXT NOT NULL           -- e.g. "admin", "write", "read"
+);
+
 -- Object chunk index (maps SHA → R2 chunk for batch reads)
 CREATE TABLE object_chunks (
   sha TEXT PRIMARY KEY,

   "r2_buckets": [

@@ -31,10 +31,10 @@ This compiles the Zig code, runs `wasm-metadce` to remove unused exports, and op
 
 ## Development
 
-Start a local dev server with Wrangler:
+Start a local dev server:
 
 ```bash
-pnpm wrangler dev
+pnpm run dev
 ```
 
 Then use git against the local server:
@@ -64,7 +64,7 @@ gitmode includes an SSH-to-HTTP proxy for `git clone ssh://...` support. Start i
 
 ```bash
 # Terminal 1: dev server
-pnpm wrangler dev
+pnpm run dev
 
 # Terminal 2: SSH proxy (translates SSH → HTTP)
 pnpm run ssh:proxy

@@ -29,7 +29,7 @@ import { Card, CardGrid } from "@astrojs/starlight/components";
     SHA-1 hashing, zlib compression, packfile parsing, delta encoding — all in Zig compiled to WASM with SIMD acceleration.
   </Card>
   <Card title="Durable Objects + R2" icon="puzzle">
-    Each repo is a Durable Object with embedded SQLite for refs and metadata. Git objects stored in R2 as compressed loose objects.
+    Each repo is a Durable Object with embedded SQLite for refs and metadata. Git objects bundled into ~2MB R2 chunks, indexed via SQLite for O(1) lookups.
   </Card>
 </CardGrid>

 ```bash

-pnpm wrangler dev
+pnpm run dev
 
 # Start the SSH proxy (default: port 2222, forwarding to http://localhost:8787)
 pnpm run ssh:proxy

@@ -1,13 +1,45 @@
 {
   "name": "gitmode",
   "version": "0.1.0",
-  "private": true,
   "description": "Git server on Cloudflare Workers — Zig WASM engine with SIMD",
   "type": "module",
   "exports": {
-    "./client": "./src/client.ts",
-    "./server": "./src/server.ts"
+    ".": {
+      "types": "./src/index.ts",
+      "default": "./src/index.ts"
+    },
+    "./server": {
+      "types": "./src/server.ts",
+      "default": "./src/server.ts"
+    },
+    "./client": {
+      "types": "./src/client.ts",
+      "default": "./src/client.ts"
+    }
+  },
+  "bin": {
+    "gitmode": "./bin/gitmode.mjs"
+  },
+  "files": [
+    "src/**/*.ts",
+    "src/wasm/*.wasm",
+    "bin/gitmode.mjs",
+    "bin/template/"
+  ],
+  "keywords": [
+    "git",
+    "cloudflare",
+    "workers",
+    "durable-objects",
+    "r2",
+    "wasm",
+    "zig"
+  ],
+  "repository": {
+    "type": "git",
+    "url": "https://github.com/teamchong/gitmode.git"
   },
+  "license": "MIT",
   "packageManager": "pnpm@10.21.0",
   "scripts": {
     "build:wasm": "cd wasm && zig build wasm -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall && mkdir -p ../src/wasm && wasm-metadce --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --graph-file exports.json zig-out/bin/gitmode.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm && wasm-opt -Oz --enable-simd --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm -o ../src/wasm/gitmode.wasm && rm ../src/wasm/gitmode.dce.wasm",
